overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a survival horror game showing a character in a long dark coat walking through a snowy, mountainous environment at night. The scene transitions from a railway platform beside train tracks into a forested trail with wooden fencing, featuring atmospheric snowfall and blue-toned cinematic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered railway platform beside train tracks

events.description: another pedestrian appears walking on the train tracks to the left, passing by the player character
character stops walking and pauses to look around before continuing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy stone platform beside train tracks, long coat billowing slightly in the wind

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the tracks in the opposite direction, passing by the player character around the 3-second mark

entered.detail: metal railway tracks running parallel to the path, partially covered in snow
snow-dusted stone pavement walkway with hexagonal tile pattern
tall dark stone wall running alongside the right side of the platform
snow-covered mountain peaks visible under the dark cloudy night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snow-covered railway platform flanked by train tracks on the left and a high stone wall on the right. Another pedestrian briefly appears walking on the tracks in the opposite direction. The environment is dark and atmospheric with snow falling gently against a backdrop of distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest trail with wooden post fencing

events.description: exiting the railway platform into the forest trail as the retaining wall ends and ground becomes natural terrain
wooden fence appears along the right side of the path, marking the transition to a more enclosed forest area

agents.ego_description: proceeding cautiously along the snowy forest path, approaching a distant warm light source visible through the trees

entered.detail: weathered wooden post and rail fence lining the right side of the trail
warm orange glowing light source mounted on a post visible through the trees ahead
dense snow-covered pine and deciduous trees surrounding the path

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the railway platform and enters a snowy forest trail where the stone pavement gives way to a dirt path. A wooden fence lines the right side as dense trees close in around the path. The character walks toward a distant warm lamp glowing through the falling snow, with the train tracks now visible only far to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a cold, industrial railway corridor into a secluded, snowy forest trail. It begins with the character walking along a snow-covered platform flanked by train tracks and a high stone wall, passing a lone pedestrian moving in the opposite direction under a dark, mountainous sky. As the character leaves the platform, the stone pavement gives way to a dirt path, and the open space of the tracks recedes into the distance to the left. The scene then shifts as dense trees close in around the trail and a wooden fence appears on the right, guiding the character deeper into the woods. Finally, the camera follows the figure through the falling snow toward the distant, warm glow of a lamp illuminating the forest path.
